notes: Shared method-level guides live under /sdk/wasm. Electron and Mini Program hubs document only platform deltas.
Electron extras below apply to the FFI/native path. Electron WASM mode follows the WASM docs for shared APIs.

extraMethods.name: login
extraMethods.notes: FFI login accepts only { userID, token }. Service addresses and log options are passed to initSDK.

missingMethods.name: clearConversationAndDeleteAllMsg
missingMethods.fallback: Use server-side history policies or product-level clear flows that do not depend on a local message database.

missingMethods.name: searchLocalMessages
missingMethods.fallback: Search through a trusted backend index, then open the conversation with IDs returned by the server.

missingMethods.name: searchFriends
missingMethods.fallback: Filter the paged friend list in the app, or search friends on the business backend.

missingMethods.name: searchGroupMembers
missingMethods.fallback: Page group members with getGroupMemberList and filter locally, or search members on the backend.

missingMethods.name: searchGroups
missingMethods.fallback: Use getJoinedGroupList pagination and filter in the app, or provide group discovery on the backend.

missingMethods.name: findMessageList
missingMethods.fallback: Keep conversationID and clientMsgID from the server or in-memory session state, then load surrounding history through available query APIs.
